name: Nafine Chemical Industry Group Co.,Ltd
summary: Nafine Chemical Industry Group Co.,Ltd engages in the production and sale of inorganic and daily chemical products in China. The company's inorganic chemicals comprise anhydrous sodium sulphate, magnesium sulphate heptahydrate, sodium hydrosulphide, barium chloride, and sodium sulphide. Its daily chemical products include grapefruit dishwashing liquids, crystal soaps, silk and wool washing liquids, lavatory fluids, and depth purification and soft care laundry detergents, as well as chemicals for heavy oil removing in kitchen. The company also provides cosmetic products, such as eye, foot guard, and hand creams, lotions, facial cleansers and masks, bath salts, toners, soaps, shower gels, and soaps. Nafine Chemical Industry Group Co.,Ltd was founded in 1996 and is based in Yuncheng, China.
